instruction: Create a part and place it in the workspace.
response:
local part = Instance.new("Part")
part.Size = Vector3.new(4, 1, 2)
part.Position = Vector3.new(0, 10, 0)
part.Anchored = true
part.Parent = workspace

instruction: Make a part that kills the player when touched.
response:
local part = Instance.new("Part")
part.Anchored = true
part.Parent = workspace

part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
	local humanoid = hit.Parent:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	if humanoid then
		humanoid.Health = 0
	end
end)

instruction: Print a message when a player joins the game.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	print(player.Name .. " joined the game")
end)

instruction: Give every player a leaderstats folder with a Coins value.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	local leaderstats = Instance.new("Folder")
	leaderstats.Name = "leaderstats"
	leaderstats.Parent = player

	local coins = Instance.new("IntValue")
	coins.Name = "Coins"
	coins.Value = 0
	coins.Parent = leaderstats
end)

instruction: Create a RemoteEvent and fire it to all clients.
response:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local remote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
remote.Name = "Notify"
remote.Parent = ReplicatedStorage

remote:FireAllClients("Hello everyone!")

instruction: Write a function that returns the distance between two parts.
response:
local function distanceBetween(a, b)
	return (a.Position - b.Position).Magnitude
end

instruction: Make a part change colour every second.
response:
local part = Instance.new("Part")
part.Anchored = true
part.Parent = workspace

while true do
	part.Color = Color3.new(math.random(), math.random(), math.random())
	task.wait(1)
end

instruction: Tween a part upward over two seconds.
response:
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local part = workspace.Part
local info = TweenInfo.new(2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
local goal = { Position = part.Position + Vector3.new(0, 10, 0) }

local tween = TweenService:Create(part, info, goal)
tween:Play()

instruction: Detect when a player chats and print their message.
Save a player's coins with a DataStore when they leave.
response:
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("Coins")

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	local coins = player.leaderstats.Coins.Value
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:SetAsync(player.UserId, coins)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("Failed to save data: " .. tostring(err))
	end
end)

instruction: Load a player's saved coins when they join.
response:
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("Coins")

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	local coins = 0
	local ok, result = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(player.UserId)
	end)
	if ok and result then
		coins = result
	end
	print(player.Name .. " has " .. coins .. " coins")
end)

instruction: Teleport the player to a position when they touch a part.
response:
local pad = workspace.Pad

pad.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
	local character = hit.Parent
	local root = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	if root then
		root.CFrame = CFrame.new(0, 50, 0)
	end
end)

instruction: Create a function that spawns a part at a given position.
response:
local function spawnPart(position)
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 2)
	part.Position = position
	part.Anchored = true
	part.Parent = workspace
	return part
end

instruction: Loop through all players and reset their health.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
	local character = player.Character
	if character then
		local humanoid = character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
		if humanoid then
			humanoid.Health = humanoid.MaxHealth
		end
	end
end

instruction: Make a script that runs every frame using RunService.
response:
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	-- runs every frame
end)

instruction: Give the player a tool from ServerStorage when they spawn.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
		local tool = ServerStorage.Sword:Clone()
		tool.Parent = player.Backpack
	end)
end)

instruction: Create a RemoteFunction that returns the server time.
response:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local remote = Instance.new("RemoteFunction")
remote.Name = "GetServerTime"
remote.Parent = ReplicatedStorage

remote.OnServerInvoke = function(player)
	return os.time()
end

instruction: Make a part fall after a delay using task.delay.
response:
local part = workspace.Part
part.Anchored = true

task.delay(3, function()
	part.Anchored = false
end)

instruction: Write a function to round a number to two decimal places.
response:
local function round2(n)
	return math.floor(n * 100 + 0.5) / 100
end

instruction: Connect to a player's Humanoid death event.
Create a ScreenGui with a TextLabel for the local player.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
gui.Parent = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
label.Size = UDim2.new(0, 200, 0, 50)
label.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -100, 0, 20)
label.Text = "Hello!"
label.Parent = gui

instruction: Make a button print when clicked.
response:
local button = script.Parent

button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	print("Button clicked")
end)

instruction: Weld two parts together.
response:
local function weld(a, b)
	local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
	weld.Part0 = a
	weld.Part1 = b
	weld.Parent = a
end

instruction: Count how many players are in the game.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local count = #Players:GetPlayers()
print("There are " .. count .. " players")

instruction: Add 10 coins to a player when they touch a coin part.
response:
local coin = workspace.Coin
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

coin.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
	local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hit.Parent)
	if player then
		player.leaderstats.Coins.Value += 10
		coin:Destroy()
	end
end)

instruction: Make a part that only the local player can see.
response:
local part = Instance.new("Part")
part.Anchored = true
part.LocalTransparencyModifier = 0
part.Parent = workspace
-- Place this in a LocalScript so only the local client creates it

instruction: Write a function that waits for a child and returns it.
Play a sound when a part is touched.
response:
local part = workspace.Part
local sound = part:WaitForChild("Sound")

part.Touched:Connect(function()
	sound:Play()
end)

instruction: Create a loop that spawns 10 parts in a row.
response:
for i = 1, 10 do
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Size = Vector3.new(2, 2, 2)
	part.Position = Vector3.new(i * 3, 5, 0)
	part.Anchored = true
	part.Parent = workspace
end

instruction: Disconnect an event connection after it fires once.
response:
local part = workspace.Part
local connection

connection = part.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
	print("Touched by " .. hit.Name)
	connection:Disconnect()
end)

instruction: Make the player walk faster.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player)
	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
		local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
		humanoid.WalkSpeed = 32
	end)
end)

instruction: Create a module script that returns a table of utility functions.
Fire a RemoteEvent from the client to the server.
response:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local remote = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Action")

remote:FireServer("jump")

instruction: Handle a RemoteEvent on the server.
response:
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local remote = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Action")

remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, action)
	print(player.Name .. " sent action: " .. tostring(action))
end)

instruction: Make a part glow by adding a PointLight.
response:
local part = workspace.Part

local light = Instance.new("PointLight")
light.Brightness = 5
light.Range = 16
light.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 200, 100)
light.Parent = part

instruction: Destroy a part after 5 seconds.
response:
local part = workspace.Part
Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
Debris:AddItem(part, 5)

instruction: Get the player's mouse position in a LocalScript.
response:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local mouse = player:GetMouse()

mouse.Button1Down:Connect(function()
	print(mouse.Hit.Position)
end)

instruction: Create a part that respawns 3 seconds after being collected.
response:
local template = workspace.Coin:Clone()
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local function setup(coin)
	coin.Touched:Connect(function(hit)
		local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(hit.Parent)
		if player then
			coin:Destroy()
			task.delay(3, function()
				local new = template:Clone()
				new.Parent = workspace
				setup(new)
			end)
		end
	end)
end

setup(workspace.Coin)

instruction: Write a function that picks a random item from a table.
response:
local function pickRandom(list)
	return list[math.random(1, #list)]
end

instruction: Anchor every part in the workspace.
response:
for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
	if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
		descendant.Anchored = true
	end
end

instruction: Make a countdown timer that prints each second.
response:
for i = 10, 1, -1 do
	print(i)
	task.wait(1)
end
print("Go!")

instruction: Create a sprint system using UserInputService.
response:
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then
		player.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 32
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then
		player.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
	end
end)
